infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Jokey uses your microphone to record audio jokes and video sound. For example, when you tap Record, your voice is captured and published as a joke for the community.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Jokey uses your camera to record video jokes. For example, when you record a video joke, the footage is saved and shared on your Jokey profile for other users to watch.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Jokey accesses your photo library so you can choose a profile picture. For example, the photo you select will be displayed on your public profile for other users to see.
